name: Chili Con Carne
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Heat olive oil in a flameproof casserole dish.
3. Add ground beef, onions, garlic, and celery to the dish. Fry gently for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add chili powder and cumin seeds. Cook gently for 2 minutes.
5. Add tomatoes and break them up with a spoon. Stir in tomato paste and kidney beans. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently.
6. Cover and bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour, stirring occasionally. Season with salt.
7. Serve chili over individual bowls of rice. Top each serving with sour cream, diced avocado, onion slices, and garnish with parsley sprig if desired.
NOTE: For a fierier flavor, increase chili powder to 1 tablespoon. To prevent avocado from discoloring, toss it in lemon juice.
